word: H7693 - שָׁגַל - shâgal - shaw-gal' - Lie with

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁגל

Transliteration: shâgal

Phonetic: shaw-gal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to violate, ravish
    1. (Qal) to violate, ravish
    2. (Niphal) to be ravished
    3. (Pual) to be ravished

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2327

Part(s) of speech: Verb
